message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in analyzeModule.zig

Long-term fix: Made stmtContainsAwait, exprContainsAwait, and
stmtContainsYield comprehensive for all expression/statement types.

stmtContainsAwait/stmtContainsYield added:
- aug_assign, return_stmt
- try_stmt, with_stmt
- for/while orelse_body handling
- Condition checking in if/for/while

exprContainsAwait added:
- All expression types (call with keyword_args, subscript, etc.)
- Comprehensions (listcomp, dictcomp, genexp)
- fstring, lambda, starred

This ensures proper async/generator detection when await/yield
appears in complex expressions or nested control flow.
